sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2646" key="ai(resiw/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἱρεσιώτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n2646.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">member of a sect</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:4:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.11</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">αἱρετισταῖς</ref> </xr>): —fem. <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἱρεσι-ῶτις</orth>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πολιτεία</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
